mapper.insert: insert into resume1 (rno, mid, jno, address, univ, major, career, experi, intro) values (seq_resume.nextVal, #{mid}, #{jno}, #{address}, #{univ}, #{major}, #{career}, #{experi}, #{intro})
mapper.update: update resume1 set address = #{address}, univ = #{univ}, major = #{major}, career = #{career}, experi = #{experi}, intro = #{intro} where rno = #{rno}
mapper.select: select r.rno, c.cname, j.deadline from job j join company c on j.cid = c.cid join resume1 r on j.jno = r.jno where r.mid = #{mid}

select r.rno, c.cname, m.mname, m.mbirth, m.memail, m.mphone, r.address, r.univ, r.major, r.career, r.experi, r.intro from resume r join member m on r.mid = m.mid join job j on r.jno = j.jno join company c on j.cid = c.cid where r.rno = #{rno}
SELECT * FROM resume1 WHERE jno = #{jno} ORDER BY rno DESC
